sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n29170" key="duskolo/koitos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δυσκολό-κοιτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n29170.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">making bed uneasy</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">μέριμνα</foreign> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0019.tlg003.perseus-grc1:420" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">420</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
